articles.title: Monasterio and Rafaela homer to power Red Sox to an 8-1 win over White Sox
articles.description:
Boston (41-48) has won four in a row and nine of its last 11 to close within seven games of .500 for the first time since May 23.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown comforts 6-year-old fan whose reaction to trade went viral
articles.description:

articles.title: Jaylen Brown on Celtics trade: Boston is home and no organization can take that away
articles.description:

articles.title: IOC eases path toward Russia returning with full team at 2028 LA Olympics
articles.description:
The IOC said the timing was because qualifying events are starting for the L.A. games, and “the need to offer equal access to these competitions to all athletes.”

articles.title: Celtics sign Ron Harper Jr. to multi-year contract
articles.description:
Harper Jr., 26, is on his second stint with the Celtics. He previously spent time with the Raptors and Pistons.

articles.title: Brad Stevens ‘lost a lot of sleep’ over the Jaylen Brown trade
articles.description:
"Somebody asked me [Monday] if I missed coaching. I said I did this week. This is not for the faint of heart."

articles.title: Boston Fleet to shift primary venue from Lowell’s Tsongas Center to BU’s Agganis Arena for upcoming season
articles.description:
Agganis’s capacity for hockey is 6,150 — about 350 seats smaller than Tsongas, but on par with the team’s average attendance this season.

articles.title: Report: Celtics’ Paul George turned down $3.9 million trade bonus
articles.description:
George had a bonus in his contract which would have taken his cap hit up to the $57.7 million league maximum.

articles.title: 5 takeaways from the Celtics’ press conference about the Jaylen Brown trade
articles.description:
Having so much money and usage tied up in two players would have made it difficult to remain at a championship-caliber level, Brad Stevens said.
